description: Build a reusable A-canon relationship backbone from primary history and romance relationship claims, then classify remaining claims against that backbone.

policyText.backboneRule: Primary history and romance A-canon claims form the local correction backbone for downstream relationship evidence.
policyText.alignmentRule: External or lower-grade claims are classified against the primary canon backbone as exact-support, pair-type-conflict, or no-primary-canon-match.
policyText.gapRule: Generals with low primary-canon relationship coverage and many unmatched/conflicting claims should be prioritized for full-book primary corpus extraction.
